composition: HSCAS, MOS, Probiotics, Organic acids & Activated Charcoal.
indications: Provides large surface area for higher adsorption of toxins & prevents Mycotoxicosis. Helps in boosting immune system & elicits immune response to fight toxigenic substances produced by fungi.
directions_for_use: For Regular Use: 1 Kg per Ton of feed (For < 15% available moisture (or) < 150ppb of toxin). For High Moisture in feed: 1.5 Kg per Ton of feed (> 15% available moisture (or) > 150 ppb of toxin). (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Each gram contains Cholecalciferol (Vitamin D3) 60000 I.U. fortified with herbal extracts.
indications: For strengthening of bones, Improving BMD & Prevention of lameness, Rickets and TD in birds.
directions_for_use: Mixing Ratio: 20-30 g per ton of feed. Initially prepare a premix by mixing 20-30 g of COLFEROL-D3 in 3 Kg feed. Mix this premix with feed for final use. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Dextrose, Herbal Antipyretics, Electrolytes, Vitamin C.
indications: For effective management of Heat stress in birds.
directions_for_use: General Heat Stress : 250-500 g per ton of feed. Acute Heat Stress : 500 g per ton of feed. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Dextrose, Herbal Antipyretics, Electrolytes, Vitamin C.
indications: For prevention of hyperthermia and to regulate body temperature during heat stress.
directions_for_use: General Heat Stress : 0.5 – 1 ml per litre water. Acute Heat Stress : 1.5 – 2 ml per litre water. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Dextrose, Herbal Antipyretics, Electrolytes, Vitamin C.
indications: For replenishment of lost body electrolytes during heat stress and restoration of bird to zone of comfort.
directions_for_use: 1g per 2 litres of drinking water. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Selected Herbal bio actives.
indications: For effective management of Cloacal / Vent Prolapse & Intussusception in birds.
directions_for_use: 10-15 ml per 100 birds for 5-7 days in drinking water. For Commercial Layers, Broilers & Broiler Breeders (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Each kg contains Tylosin Phosphate equivalent to Tylosin base 100gm.
indications: For effective treatment of infections caused by Streptococcus, Staphylococcus, Pasteurella, Campylobacter. Chronic Respiratory Disease (CRD) caused by Mycoplasma gallisepticum, infectious synovitis, and spirochetosis caused by Borrelia anserine.
directions_for_use: Layers: 500 g per Ton of feed (50 ppm) from point of laying till 42nd week and 200 g per Ton of feed (20 ppm) from 43rd week to culling. Broilers: 200 g per Ton of feed (20 ppm) from day 1 to 45th day. Broiler Breeders: 500 g per Ton of feed from point of laying to culling. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Lincomycin 1%, Doxycycline 2%, Neomycin Sulphate 2% & Herbal extracts of Ocimum sanctum, Curcuma longa, Emblica officinalis, Terminalia belerica, Terminalia chebula.
indications: For the control of Gram Positive & Gram Negative bacterial infections, wet droppings and vent pasting in birds. Also controls and prevents Necrotic Enteritis & maintains the colonization of native and useful bacteria in intestines.
directions_for_use: Broilers Breeders Regular use: 500 g per Ton of feed for 5-7days a month. During production decline :1-1.5 kg per Ton of feed for 5-7days a month. (or) As directed by the Veterinarian. Commercial Layers & Broilers: Regular use: 250 g - 500 g per Ton of feed for 5-7days a month. During production decline : 1 kg per Ton of feed for 5-7days a month. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Each 50g contains Vitamin K3....500 mg.
indications: Helps as antihaemorrhagic agent during debeaking & protects against coccidiosis infection.
directions_for_use: Chicks & Growers : 50 g per day for 3000 chicks for 5-7 days. Coccidiosis : 1 g in 5 Litres for 7-10days. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Vitamin A (Palmitate) 100000 I.U.
indications: For effective rejuvenation of epithelial tissues, maintenance of Bone health & control of GOUT.
directions_for_use: 2-5 ml per 100 birds for 5-7 days in drinking water. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Unique blend of organic, inorganic acids and essential oils.
indications: Helps in maintenance of pH in GIT, improves digestion and assimilation of nutrients.
directions_for_use: When used with AGP: Broilers Breeders 1 kg per ton of feed, Broilers 500g per ton of feed, Layers 500g per ton of feed. When used without AGP: Broilers Breeders 2.5 - 3 kg per ton of feed, Broilers 2 – 2.5 kg per ton of feed, Layers 1.5 - 2 kg per ton of feed. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Blend of Probiotic strains added @ 4 X 10^9 cfu. namely, Bacillus subtilis, Bacillus licheniformis, Bacillus coagulans, Clostridium butyricum, Streptococcus faecalis, Enterococcus faecium, Saccharomyces boulardii.
indications: For establishing the state of EUBIOSIS by creating good intestinal microflora and for controlling diarrhea of unknown etiology.
directions_for_use: 1 g per 1-2 Litres of drinking water. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Blend of Probiotic strains added @ 4 X 10^9 cfu. namely, Bacillus subtilis, Bacillus licheniformis, Bacillus coagulans, Clostridium butyricum, Streptococcus faecalis, Enterococcus faecium, Saccharomyces boulardii.
indications: For establishing the state of EUBIOSIS by creating good intestinal microflora and for controlling diarrhea of unknown etiology.
directions_for_use: 100 g per ton of feed. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Contains 100 mg Enrofloxacin per ml.
indications: For effective treatment of Gastrointestinal infections, respiratory infections and urinary tract infections in poultry caused by micro-organisms like Campylobacter, E. coli, Haemophilus, Mycoplasma, Pasteurella and Salmonella species.
directions_for_use: 10 mg per kg body weight (1 ml of solution in 2 Liters of water) once daily orally for a span of 3-5 days in drinking water. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian. Withdrawal Period: 5 Days for Eggs and 8 days for Chicken (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Levofloxacin Hemihydrate I.P. Eq. to Levofloxacin.... 100 mg & Bromhexine Hydrochloride I.P. .. 15 mg.
indications: For treatment of respiratory infections caused by bacteria including Mycoplasmosis, Fowl Cholera, Infectious Coryza, Salmonellosis, Colibacillosis.
directions_for_use: 1 ml / 10kg body weight (or) 1 ml / 4 liters of drinking water for 3 - 5 days. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian. Withdrawal Period: Chicken : 28 days, Eggs : 7 days

composition: Each gram contains Azithromycin I.P. ...100 mg
indications: For treatment of Chronic Respiratory Diseases (CRD) caused by Mycoplasma spp. and URTI caused by Gram positive bacteria.
directions_for_use: 10 mg per kg body weight for 3-5 days for poultry, sheep, goat & cattle. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

packing: 20 kg premix Bucket + 500 g Eliminator concentrate + 150 Bait Stations.
composition: Premix : Contains homogeneous blend of Rice, Maize, Wheat, Jowar and Bajra flours with added flavours. Eliminator Concentrate: Bromadiolone 0.25% w/w
indications: For control of rodent infestation in poultry farms.
directions_for_use: 20 Kg Bucket with 150 Bait Stations is sufficient for covering an area of poultry farm that lodges 20000 Commercial Layers (or) 10000 Broilers Breeders (or) 40000 Commercial Broilers.

composition: Herbal Bioactive spray.
indications: For control of fly larval propagation.
directions_for_use: Mix 10 ml per Litre of water & Spray over litter. (1 Litre is sufficient for treating an area of 50-200 sft).

composition: Rapid Acting Herbal Bioactives with natural desiccants.
indications: For improved litter management and control of fly larval propagation.
directions_for_use: Mix 5 ml per Litre of water & Spray over litter. (1 Litre is sufficient for treating an area of 50-200 sft).

composition: Red Bentonite fortified with herbal bioactives.
indications: For litter conditioning and management. Also for control of fly larval propagation.
directions_for_use: For application in Layers: 600 ml to 800 ml of LARVEND is sufficient for spray in a shed with a capacity of 10000 birds. For application in Broiler Breeders: 800 ml of LARVEND is sufficient for spray in a shed with a capacity of 2000 birds. Prepare a working solution for spray, by adding 100 ml of LARVEND to 10 Litres of water and mix thoroughly for better dispersibility.

composition: Contains herbal extracts, Red Bentonite(Natural Clay) & Selective litter desiccants.
indications: Unique litter conditioning agent for proper litter management.
directions_for_use: For application in Layers: 400 ml to 600 ml of LARVEND GOLD PLUS is sufficient for spray in a shed with a capacity of 10000 birds. For application in Broiler Breeders: 600 ml of LARVEND GOLD PLUS is sufficient for spray in a shed with a capacity of 2000 birds. Prepare a working solution for spray, by adding 100 ml of LARVEND GOLD PLUS to 10 Litres of water and mix thoroughly for better dispersibility.

composition: Cyromazine 2% & Kaolin.
indications: For fly larval control.
directions_for_use: Mix 250 g per Ton of feed and feed orally for 4-6 weeks continuously.

composition: Propoxure 2% bait.
indications: For killing adult house flies.
directions_for_use: Sprinkle SPOTON on all fly infested areas & spread SPOTON granules on paper plate or gunny bags or old egg trays separated by a gap of 10-15 ft.

composition: Cypermethrin 10% EC.
indications: For efficient control of insects including Lice, Mites, Ticks and Flies.
directions_for_use: Prepare a working solution of 5-15 ml per litre & spray this mixture on all fly infested areas. For control of Lice and Mites: Mix FreeAll @ 3-5 ml per litre and use 50-60 litres of this spray mixture for an area of 1000 sft.

composition: Triple salt containing Potassium Monopersulphate, Potassium Hydrogen Sulphate & Potassium Sulphate (49.8% W/W) Sodium Chloride (1.5% W/W) Buffer & Excipients q.s.
indications: Broad spectrum disinfectant that offers potent antimicrobial activity.
directions_for_use: Aerial spray in presence of birds: 5 g per litre of water (for 125 sft. area). Terminal disinfection: 5 g per litre of water (for 25 sft. area). Routine water sanitation: 1 g per 10 litres of water. Water sanitation during disease outbreaks: 1 g per litre of water. Hatchery sanitation: 5 g per litre of water (Both for spraying, mopping & equipment washing). Foot dip / Vehicle dip : 5-10 g per litre of water. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: High Boiling Tar Acid (HBTA) rich creosote oil & Phenolic compounds of high efficiency in killing germs.
indications: An effective germicide for disinfection of vehicle dips, foot dips, hatcheries and other areas with potentially high microbial load.
directions_for_use: Foot dips & Vehicle dips: Mix 5-10 ml per litre of water & use for foot and vehicle dips. General cleaning: Mix 5 ml per litre of water and use it for floor cleaning or for any other general cleaning purpose. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Contains Formaldehyde 37% W/W with high Methanol content & added Stabilizers.
indications: An effective disinfectant with potent Bactericidal, Sporicidal, Fungicidal and Virucidal activity.
directions_for_use: Use 1-3% (10-30 ml/1 Litre of water) depending on the intended use and site of application. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Contains Glutaraldehyde…11.0 g, Didecyl Dimethyl Ammonium Chloride…..8.15g, Benzalkonium Chloride….17.85 g, Excipients…….Q.S.
indications: An excellent broad spectrum biocide for controlling Gram Positive & Gram Negative Bacteria, Mycoplasma, Fungal & Viral infections.
directions_for_use: Non-Food Contact Areas: Prepare a solution of 4 ml per Litre water and spray over an area of 25 sft. In the Presence of Birds: Prepare a solution of 4 ml per Litre water and spray over an area of 150 sft. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Contains Didecyl Dimethyl Ammonium Chloride…..15 g. Aqueous Base….Q.S.
indications: Fast acting Biocide with potent Bactericidal, Virucidal, Fungicidal and Algaecidal activity even in the presence of Hard Water & varied pH.
directions_for_use: During Disease Out Break: Spray a solution of 5 ml per Litre water. As a Water Sanitiser: Mix 1 ml in 20 Litres of water. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Contains bio actives from natural extracts of selective plant species that acts as ectoparasiticides.
indications: For effective control of ectoparasites in poultry such as flies, lice, mites and soft ticks.
directions_for_use: Mix 1 Kg ECTOHIBIT-FS per ton of feed and use it on 1st, 5th , 12th, 25th, 37th & 50th days to get rid of the problem. For Spraying on birds: Mix 5g per liter of water (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Herbal & Synthetic bioactives, Vitamins, Minerals, Aminoacids, Antioxidants, Immunostimulants, Hepatoprotectants.
indications: Unique and complete health tonic For improved productivity.
directions_for_use: Chicks: 5-8 ml for 100 Chicks for 5-7 Days. Broilers: 8-10 ml for 100 birds for 2 Days in a week. Layers: 8-10 ml for 100 birds for 1 week in a month. Broiler Breeders: 20 ml for 100 birds for 1 week in a month. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Higher concentrations of Herbal & Synthetic bioactives, Vitamins, Minerals, Aminoacids, Antioxidants, Digestive enzymes, Immunostimulants, Hepatoprotectants.
indications: Unique and complete health tonic for improved productivity.
directions_for_use: Chicks: 5 ml for 100 Chicks for 5-7 Days. Broilers: 7 ml for 100 birds for 2 Days in a week. Layers: 7 ml for 100 birds for 1 week in a month. Broiler Breeders: 15-20 ml for 100 birds for 1 week in a month. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Herbal & Synthetic bioactives, Vitamins, Minerals, Aminoacids, Antioxidants, Immunostimulants, Hepatoprotectants.
indications: An ideal hepatoprotectant that prevents Mycotoxicosis.
directions_for_use: Commercial Layers: Regular mixing rate 250 g per ton of feed. Mixing rate when production declines 500 g per ton of feed. Broiler & Broiler Breeders: Regular mixing rate 500 g per ton of feed. Mixing rate when production declines 1-1.5 Kg per ton of feed. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Herbal & Synthetic bioactives, Vitamins, Minerals, Aminoacids, Antioxidants, Digestive enzymes, Immunostimulants, Hepatoprotectants.
indications: Complete Health Supplement for increased productivity.
directions_for_use: Commercial Layers: 250 g per ton of feed. Broilers & Broiler Breeders: 0.5-1.5 kg per Metric Ton of feed. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Iron, Vitamin B9, Vitamin B12 with added HGF Boosters.
indications: An excellent Haematinic for time management of Anaemic condition in birds & offers supportive therapy for CAV infection.
directions_for_use: Chicks: 5 ml for 1000 birds for 5 to 7 days. Broiler Breeders: 10-15 ml for 100 birds for a weak in a month. Growers Broilers & Layers: 5 ml for 100 birds for a weak in a month. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Iron, Vitamin B9, Vitamin B12 with added HGF Boosters.
indications: An excellent Haematinic for time management of Anaemic condition in birds & offers supportive therapy for CAV infection.
directions_for_use: Broilers & Layers: 1 Kg per ton of feed for 10 - 15 days. Broiler Breeders: 1-2 Kg per ton of feed for 10 - 15 days. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Higher concentrations of Vitamin B-Complex L-Lysine, Methionine & Tri Choline Citrate.
indications: For management of general debility & prevention of polyneuritis in birds.
directions_for_use: As a Liver Tonic & Detoxifier: Chicks: 5 ml per 100 birds for 5-7 days. Growers, Layers, Broilers, Broiler Breeders: 10-20 ml per 100 birds for 5-7 days. As a B-Complex Supplement: Chicks: 2 ml per 100 birds for 5-7 days. Growers, Layers, Broilers, Broiler Breeders: 5 ml per 100 birds for 5-7 days. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Vitamins, Minerals, EAA, Malt, Tri Choline Citrate, Protein Hydrolysate, Herbal Appetizers & Digestive enzymes.
indications: For achieving optimum growth and performance by fine tuning of body physiology and metabolism in birds.
directions_for_use: Chicks & Growers : 5-10 ml per 100 birds for 5-7 days. Layers :10-15 ml per 100 birds for 5-7 days. Broilers : 15-20 ml per 100 birds for 5-7 days. Broiler Breeders : 20 -25 ml per 100 birds for 5-7 days. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Vitamin D3, Vitamin B12, Ferric Ammonium Citrate, Tri Choline Citrate, Elemental Calcium with improved Bio-availability.
indications: For achieving Calcium homeostasis, strengthening of Bones, Nervous system & for correcting hepatic insufficiency in birds.
directions_for_use: Chicks :5ml per 5-7 days for 100 birds. Growers/ Broilers/ Layers : 15ml per 5-7 days for 100 birds. Broiler Breeders : 25ml per 5-7 days for 100 birds. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Vitamin A, B12, C, D3, Calcium and Phosphorus in 2:1 ratio.
indications: For achieving Calcium homeostasis, strengthening of Bones, Nervous system.
directions_for_use: 1Kg per ton of feed for 7-10 days every month. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: MCHC, Vitamin A, B12, C, D3, Calcium and Phosphorus in 2:1 ratio.
indications: Enhances bioavailability of Calcium and Phosphorous especially during egg laying phase and also for improved egg shell quality.
directions_for_use: Mix 500g -1Kg per ton of feed for a span of 7-10 days in a month. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Superior quality trace element mixture with Mn, Zn, Cu, Fe, I, Se.
indications: For improving mineral absorption and assimilation & for improvement of other physiological activities that are vital for growth & development.
directions_for_use: Mix 1Kg of QUALIMIN PLUS powder for 1 ton of feed. (or) As Suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Chelated form of vital trace elements with organic amino acid base as organic carrier.
indications: For improved GIT absorption and bioavailability which in turn enhances immunity, body metabolism and overall productivity.
directions_for_use: Growers, Layers & Broilers : 500g -1 Kg per Ton of feed. Broiler Breeders : 1 - 2 Kg per Ton of feed. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.

composition: Contains Anti-stress Vitamins, Minerals and other vital bio actives for enhanced metabolism.
indications: An excellent stress reliever for improved laying performance and overall health.
directions_for_use: Chicks: 2 ml per 100 birds for 5-7 days. Growers & Layers: 4 ml per 100 birds for 5-7 days. Broilers/ Broiler Breeders :5 ml per 100 birds for 5-7 days. (or) As suggested by the Veterinarian.
